activeChallenges.title: Mow Them Down
activeChallenges.description: Kill 150 Enemies with a Primary Weapon

activeChallenges.title: Survival
activeChallenges.description: Complete a Survival mission reaching at least 20 minutes

challenge.title: Make it personal
challenge.description: Kill 75 Scaldra Troops with Melee Weapons

upgrades.title: Friendly Fallout
upgrades.description: Attacks from Specters or Companions have a 25% chance to cause Radiation Status.

upgrades.title: Involuntary Transfusion
upgrades.description: Weakpoint kills have a 25% chance to generate an Universal Orb.

upgrades.title: Psionic Feedback
upgrades.description: On Damaged 10% chance to set off a 250 damage, 5m radius blast of radiation on taking damage.

deviation.title: Sealed Armor
deviation.description: Enemies take 90% less damage from non-Weak Point hits.

risks.title: Commanding Culverins
risks.description: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviation.title: Barbed Glyphs
deviation.description: Each Glyph inflicts a small amount of damage when collected.

risks.title: Fortified Foes
risks.description: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

deviation.title: Double Demolishers
deviation.description: Two Necramech Demolishers will attack any conduit, but their health is reduced.

risks.title: Postmortal Surges
risks.description: Slain enemies burts with Void energy.

variables.title: Hypersensitive
variables.description: Duration of negative Status Effects is tripled

variables.title: Fractured Armor
variables.description: Casting an ability reduces armor by 10% for 10s.

deviation.title: Sealed Armor
deviation.description: Enemies take 90% less damage from non-Weak Point hits.

risks.description: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviation.title: Barbed Glyphs
deviation.description: Each Glyph inflicts a small amount of damage when collected.

risks.title: Fortified Foes
risks.description: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

risks.title: Entanglement
risks.description: Allies within 4m of slain enemies endure reduced Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity.

deviation.title: Double Demolishers
deviation.description: Two Necramech Demolishers will attack any conduit, but their health is reduced.

risks.title: Postmortal Surges
risks.description: Slain enemies burts with Void energy.

risks.title: Alluring Arcocanids
risks.description: As Rogue Arcocanids charge attacks, they pull Warframes towards them.

variables.title: Hypersensitive
variables.description: Duration of negative Status Effects is tripled

variables.title: Fractured Armor
variables.description: Casting an ability reduces armor by 10% for 10s.

deviation.title: Growth Hormones
deviation.description: Legacytes are more powerful with each generation but take longer to escape.

risks.title: Miasmite Swarm
risks.description: Techrot Miasmites swarm out of the shadows throught the mission.

deviation.title: Noise Suppression
deviation.description: Drones fly above Flare, spraying them with Efervon gas.

risks.title: Scaldra Speed Run
risks.description: All enemies are replaced with Scaldra and move much faster.

deviation.title: Thermian Plating
deviation.description: Only Thermian RPGs can damage the tank. Reinforcements that carry Thermian RPGs will arrive during the fight

risks.title: Arcade Automate
risks.description: Enemy guns launch large, slow moving orbs instead of their usual ordnance.

variables.title: Energy Exhaustion
variables.description: Lose 2 Energy per second for each enemy within 10 meters of you.

variables.title: Untreatable
variables.description: Pickups do not heal, and Health Orbs cannot be picked up.
